entity.description: A Levite of the family of Merari (Neh. 11:15; 1 Chr. 9:14).

nodes.label: Hasshub
nodes.description: A Levite of the family of Merari (Neh. 11:15; 1 Chr. 9:14).

verses.text: And of the Levites; Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;
Also of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hashub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, the son of Bunni;
